## Type of Change

<!-- Place an x in the relevant box -->

- [ ] Fix: corrects an error or factual mistake
- [ ] Clarification: improves wording without changing the technical content
- [ ] Normative change: alters a requirement or defined behaviour
- [ ] New content: adds a new section or extends the specification
- [ ] Structural: reorganises or reformats without changing content

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited in scope to what is described above
- [ ] Normative requirements use "must", "must not", "should", or "may" consistently with existing usage
- [ ] Any external references (standard document, section number) are cited correctly
- [ ] The document still renders correctly as Markdown
